channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: They Call Trump Divisive. His Record Tells a Different Story.
Update: Another Nail Gets Hammered Into Media-Driven Talking Point About Arrests of Non-Violent Illegals
Yes, Even in 2026, Itâs Still 'the Economy, Stupid'
Adam Schiff makes endorsement in California gubernatorial race
item.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California is backing his House Democratic colleague Rep. Eric Swalwell in the Golden State governor's race.

item.title: Trump admin to repeal Obama-era greenhouse gas finding in large-scale deregulation
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration is set to reverse a 2009 greenhouse gas finding in what EPA chief calls "largest deregulation" in U.S. history...

item.title: Iran draws missile red line as analysts warn Tehran is stalling US talks
item.description: Iran rejects U.S. demands to negotiate ballistic missile program as tensions escalate across Middle East despite ongoing diplomatic talks in Oman.

item.title: Pollster Allocco to Newsmax: GOP Holds Alaska, Maine Senate Seats
item.description: Pollster Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that Republican incumbents remain well-positioned to hold Senate seats in Alaska and Maine in November...

item.title: Zohran Mamdani's 'Green Schools for a Healthier New York Cityâ Is a Monumental Waste of Money
40+ GOP Congressmen Urge FCC to Keep TV Ownership Cap
item.description: Almost a quarter of Republicans in Congress are urging the FCC not to lift the national television ownership cap, warning that doing so would trigger ...

item.title: Senate races to avert third shutdown as DHS deal takes shape
item.description: Department of Homeland Security faces a potential shutdown affecting TSA, FEMA and the Coast Guard, as Senate Democrats push for immigration enforceme...

item.title: Chinese Fighters Flew Risky Maneuvers Near Taiwan Jets
item.description: Chinese fighter jets conducted "risky and provocative" maneuvers near Taiwanese F-16 aircraft during the "Justice Mission 2025" military exercise stag...

item.title: Euro Intel: Russia Thinks It Can Outsmart US on Ukraine
item.description: Russian officials have no desire to halt Russia's almost 4yearold invasion of neighboring Ukraine and think they can "outsmart" the United States duri...

item.title: Dems: WH Offer on ICE 'Insufficient'; Shutdown Looms Friday
item.description: Democrat leaders say a proposal from the White House is "incomplete and insufficient" as they are demanding new restrictions on President Donald Trump...

item.title: Conservatives Should Support the SAVE America Act
As Ukraine war drags on, Trump hits Putin by squeezing Russiaâs proxies
item.description: President Donald Trump threatened "very severe consequences" on Russia in 2025 if Moscow didn't end Ukraine war, pressuring Russian allies Iran and Ve...
